name: Benjamin Britten
abstract: Edward Benjamin Britten, Baron Britten (22 November 1913 – 4 December 1976) was an English composer, conductor, and pianist. He was a central figure of 20th-century British music, with a range of works including opera, other vocal music, orchestral and chamber pieces.

about_quotes.speaker: Don Menza and Sam Noto
about_quotes.evidence: There’s also a beautiful concert hall where Benjamin Britten used to go and give his premier performances north of London called Maltings.
